NAVAREA XIX 52/26



1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  130630 UTC APR 26

NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.



72-31.40N 020-20.60E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER

71-14.60N 022-14.85E COSL PROSPECTOR

65-51.70N 007-23.80E SCARABEO 8

65-42.38N 007-39.79E FLOATEL ENDURANCE

65-31.00N 007-12.00E TRANSOCEAN NORGE

65-18.70N 007-15.70E ISLAND INNOVATOR

65-21.70N 007-20.00E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE



NOTES:

A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.

B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW

2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　39/26
